vlan collect information:
note: 0 represent m-anz-vic-833csm-fg-la-a-s01, 1 represent m-anz-vic-833csm-fg-la-a-s02, 2 represent m-anz-vic-833csm-fg-la-a-s03 
vlans access ports:
1:0&+1&+2&
